parameters.query:
SELECT company_id
, company_name
, cik as cik_number
, ticker as ticker_symbol
FROM sec_intel.company
ORDER BY company_name;

INSERT INTO sec_intel.filing
    ( company_id, form_type, filing_date
    , accession_number, filing_url
    , primary_document, dt_created )
VALUES
    ( {{ $json.company_id }}
    , '{{ $json.form_type }}'
    , '{{ $json.filing_date }}'
    , '{{ $json.accession_number }}'
    , '{{ $json.filing_url }}'
    , '{{ $json.primary_document }}'
    , NOW() )
ON CONFLICT (accession_number) DO NOTHING
RETURNING filing_id;

INSERT INTO sec_intel.filing_insight
    ( filing_id, summary, key_risks
    , financial_highlights, contracts_mentioned
    , workforce_changes, sentiment
    , llm_model, dt_created )
VALUES
    ( {{ $('Insert Filing').item.json.filing_id }}
    , '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    , '{{ ($json.key_risks || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    , '{{ ($json.financial_highlights || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    , '{{ ($json.contracts_mentioned || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    , '{{ ($json.workforce_changes || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    , '{{ $json.sentiment }}'
    , '{{ $json.llm_model || "stub" }}'
    , NOW() );

SELECT c.company_name
     , c.ticker
     , f.form_type
     , f.filing_date
     , f.filing_url
     , fi.summary
     , fi.key_risks
     , fi.financial_highlights
     , fi.contracts_mentioned
     , fi.sentiment
FROM sec_intel.filing_insight fi
JOIN sec_intel.filing f
  ON f.filing_id = fi.filing_id
JOIN sec_intel.company c
  ON c.company_id = f.company_id
WHERE fi.dt_created >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY c.company_name, f.filing_date DESC;

parameters.body: ={"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":2000,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"You are an aerospace/defense industry analyst. Analyze this SEC filing and return ONLY valid JSON with these keys: summary (string), key_risks (string), financial_highlights (string), contracts_mentioned (string), workforce_changes (string), sentiment (string: positive/negative/neutral/mixed). Company: {{ $('Parse Filings').item.json.company_name }} ({{ $('Parse Filings').item.json.ticker_symbol }}). Filing Type: {{ $('Parse Filings').item.json.form_type }}. Filing Date: {{ $('Parse Filings').item.json.filing_date }}. Filing Text: {{ $('Truncate Filing').item.json.filing_text.replace(/\"/g, '').substring(0, 30000) }}. Respond ONLY with the JSON object. No markdown no backticks."}]}
